title: Jest's Swords PLUS
description: Just a *Small* content mod I've made (Currently undergoing (relatively) frequent updates)
body:
# Jest's Swords PLUS
Welcome to Jest's Swords PLUS — a mod with a title less ridiculous then the weapons it adds.

As the name (barely) suggests, this mod introduces a variety of powerful, strange, and occasionally absurd swords into the world of Minecraft — PLUS a handful of chaotic extras. The "PLUS" is important. It means there's more than just swords… a lot more.

This is a serious mod (with an unserious name) that aims to enhance Minecraft's combat system by introducing new weapons that range from genuinely dangerous to outrageously bizarre. Whether you're cleaving through mobs with a legendary blade or hurling some cobbled-together chaos at your enemies, there's something here for everyone.

## Weapons Included:

Incense Sword - More effective than a wooden sword? Barely, More convinient? Hells No! Ignites enemies? Hells Yeah!!!

CYN Claws - Murder Drones Reference!

DNA Dagger - not very useful...


<details>
  <summary> Spoiler: Easter Egg Weapons </summary>
These are weapons added as references, jokes, or gifts to friends and community members who contributed ideas or inspired chaos:

Hal's Beard – Not just facial hair. It’s a weapon.

Feedbacker, Knuckleblaster & Whiplash – Iconic melee tools from ULTRAKILL (Added on request from a friend; credit to Hakita for the originals, though I don’t know him personally).

JayDay & Tamashī Tokens – Iconic weapon of a good pal o' mine.

Fistful of Dollar – Also called a fistful o' fun.

Gladiossis – You'll have a **Bone** to pick with your enemies.

</details>
More Mayhem Awaits:
<details>
 <summary> Spoiler </summary>
Tomathork – A devastating weapon that fuses the power of Mjolnir and a brutal war axe. If thunder and tree-felling had a baby, it would be this.

</details>
This is the official release of a passionate project aimed at making Minecraft combat more destructive, chaotic, and laugh-out-loud fun. Whether you're here for the jokes, the destruction, or both — there's a weapon waiting for you in Legendary, Great, Broad, Twisted, Incense, Quilted, Swords PLUS.

## What is  this mod about?
Legendary, Great, Broad, Twisted, Incense, Quilted Swords PLUS is a mod designed for fun and mayhem. "How do I cause this mayhem?" you may be asking yourself - well fret not, for if yo have JEI, you can look up the recipies of the weapons, or check the 'Images' section on the mod page.

This mod is meant to be fairly interactive - and I want to have a lot  of "Viewer-Inspired Content" where if you have a Weapon Idea, you can comment it on my videos on youtube - you can also make art and I might add it to this mod, of course, I will message you if you have been chosen, and credit you in the "glitched" text ((Example here:) §k weapon <Design/Idea/Name/Concept/Inspiration/ ect. Here> by <Person's Name Here>)

Here is a video for version 0.3 of my mod, and its (combat-oriented) recipies: [https://youtu.be/yD2UgKdP8FM](https://youtu.be/yD2UgKdP8FM).

Prepare to swing. Or die trying.



# Breaking News!!! Silksong is out, and has inspired content!!!
This content includes a new material, the: Ruined Crest; used to craft 7 unique weapons, each based off of a Crest from Hollow Knight Silksong.

# Do You Love Reading??? Well So Do I!
If you've never heard of the Library of Babel, then read up (pun intended); while not close to a perfect recreation, the new dimension: the Library of Babel exists a book-filled plain, new blocks (Crooked Bookshelf, Infested Bookshelf, Infested Crooked Bookshelf, Bookwyrm Statue), new mobs (Bookworm, THE LIBRARIAN), and - unrelated to the Library of Babel - a Jousting Lance (the Jester's Lament); as seen here:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ePIbMpMhW-M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

as well as the new affect: Adrenaline - increases the following by varying amounts: move speed, atk damage, health points, armour points.

Check out the Youtube Video (2/04/2026): https://youtu.be/BMKurkEjTVQ 

Happy Murdering, Everybody!
